creator: skreuzer@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Heard back from the author of the library and his response was "liblcfg 
is licensed under BSD. The headers in the source file are an artifact of 
a license change, they will disappear with the next update." I am going 
to keep the LICENSE set to bsd and will keep an eye on his git repo and 
pull in the changes when he makes them
